title: More Mob Variants - FIX
description: Fix missing textures for MoreMobVariants Mod
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d51139f303809ed88db67bb1c28f4b20369159e.png)
## 📖 About This resource pack fixes the missing texture error for the Pale Wolf from the [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants) mod by [nyuppo](https://modrinth.com/user/nyuppo). ☕ Consider buying me a [coffee](https://ko-fi.com/carptersers).
